function: gold {
result: d{d10,d12,2d8,2d8,3d12,3d12,3d12,3d12,4d10,4d10,4d10,4d10,4d10,4d10,5d12,5d12,5d12,5d12,5d12,5d12,5d12,5d12,7d10,7d10,7d10,7d10,7d10,7d10,7d10,7d10,7d10,7d10,7d10,7d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,8d10,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,10d12,15d10,15d10,15d10,15d10,15d10,15d10,14d20,14d20,20d20,[gold]*2}
}

output [gold] named "gold"
